prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **EA888 Gen 3 (CJXC, 2.0L TSI)** with upgraded **Garrett GT2867RS turbocharger**, supporting 340 HP and 360 lb-ft on 93 octane (or 360 HP/380 lb-ft with E30 ethanol blend), paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport 3-port diverter valve** and **034 Motorsport high-pressure fuel pump** to prevent fuel starvation under boost

KW Suspensions **Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable)** with **034 Motorsport Motorsport subframe collars** and **H&R 24mm front / 22mm rear anti-roll bars** to eliminate body roll, complemented by **Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms** for precise cornering on the Scirocco’s MQB-derived platform

Full **Milltek Sport 304 stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system** with **2.5-inch mandrel-bent piping**, **resonated center section**, and **dual 4.5-inch rolled-edge tips**, paired with a **VWR carbon fiber rear diffuser** to optimize airflow and reduce backpressure for the EA888’s turbo spool
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Scirocco-specific, not Golf/R) with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **overfenders** to fit **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 19x9.5 ET35 wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/30/19)**, retaining the stock bolt pattern but widening the track by 30mm per side

**VWR R-Line carbon fiber mirror covers** and **custom gloss-black VW Motorsport grille badge** to replace the R-Line emblem, paired with **Osram Night Breaker Laser H7/H11 headlight bulbs** and **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** for aggressive front-end illumination

**Seibon carbon fiber hood** (OEM-spec replacement, not universal) with **hidden heat extractor vents** to reduce underhood temps, finished with a **3M Matte Black vinyl wrap** on the roof and pillars to contrast the **VW Lapiz Blue paint (LC5M)** and **debadged rear hatch** for a stealth OEM+ look
